name: Kimball Electronics, Inc.
description: Kimball Electronics, Inc. is a multifaceted manufacturing solutions provider that specializes in Electronics Manufacturing Services (EMS), Contract Manufacturing Services (CMS), and Engineering & Design Services. Headquartered in Jasper, Indiana, the company serves a diverse range of markets, including medical, automotive, and industrial sectors. With a global footprint spanning North America, Europe, and Asia, Kimball Electronics focuses on delivering high-quality, technology-driven solutions that improve health, safety, and productivity. The company is currently transitioning its brand identity to Kimball Solutions to reflect its evolution and 65-year history of excellence in the manufacturing industry.
